overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART metro system in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling from a dark underground tunnel through a sunlit elevated track with views of Night City's futuristic skyline. The interior features holographic advertisements and other passengers, with dramatic lighting changes as the train emerges into bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro car interior traveling through underground tunnel

events.description: train approaches tunnel exit as bright daylight becomes visible through the front windows

agents.ego_description: standing in metro car holding support pole, facing forward through the train windows

notable_agents.action: woman with backpack standing and looking at her phone
man sitting on bench with head down wearing a face mask

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel walls rushing past the windows with occasional lights
futuristic green upholstered bench seats with metallic frames
illuminated digital route display showing NCART line information and stops
floating holographic ad panel above the windows displaying animated content
metallic vertical pole for standing passengers to hold

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dimly lit NCART metro car traveling through an underground tunnel. The interior is illuminated by artificial lighting and digital displays. A woman stands on the left checking her phone while a masked man sits on the center bench. The tunnel walls rush past the windows until the train approaches the exit around 12 seconds, where bright daylight begins to flood in.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro track with panoramic city views

events.description: bright golden sunlight floods the train interior as it fully exits the tunnel
view opens up to reveal futuristic skyscrapers and the elevated rail structure of Night City

agents.ego_description: continuing train ride now bathed in warm sunlight, observing the cityscape through the windows

notable_agents.action: man remains seated on bench in the same position
man standing by the door looking out at the passing cityscape

entered.detail: distant view of Night City's towering skyscrapers and urban sprawl
reflective glass and steel high-rise buildings passing by the windows
intense golden hour sunlight creating lens flare through the windows
concrete and metal support structures of the elevated train track

segments.scene_description: The train bursts out of the tunnel into brilliant golden hour sunlight, dramatically changing the interior lighting. The view opens to reveal Night City's futuristic skyline with glass skyscrapers and elevated rail infrastructure. The seated passenger remains in place while another stands by the door observing the city. Holographic advertisements inside the car cycle to new content as the train continues along the elevated track.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track passing commercial district with industrial elements

events.description: train passes large DTR corporate building with prominent illuminated signage
interior holographic advertisements cycle to new commercial content

agents.ego_description: continuing journey through the urban canyon, passing commercial and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: seated man remains in same position with head down
standing man continues holding support pole near the door

entered.detail: large industrial building with prominent DTR corporate logo signage
construction cranes and industrial equipment visible against the skyline
platform structures and station elements suggesting approach to a stop

segments.scene_description: The train continues through a more industrial section of the elevated track, passing the prominent DTR building with its large corporate signage. Industrial cranes and construction equipment dot the skyline. The interior remains consistent with the same passengers, while holographic ads cycle through new content. The train maintains steady speed as it travels through the urban canyon with station infrastructure becoming visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement inside a metro car as it transitions from a dim underground tunnel into the brilliant, sun-drenched expanse of a futuristic city. It begins in a dimly lit interior where artificial lights illuminate a woman on her phone and a masked man on a bench, while the dark tunnel walls rush past the windows. As the train bursts from the tunnel, the scene is suddenly flooded with golden hour sunlight, shifting the interior lighting and revealing a sprawling skyline of glass skyscrapers and elevated rail infrastructure. The view then expands across an industrial urban canyon, passing the prominent DTR corporate building and construction cranes while holographic advertisements inside the car cycle through new content. The movement concludes as the train maintains its steady speed, gliding past heavy infrastructure toward a distant station.
